name: Clairmont Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, whisk together the salad oil, vinegar, sugar, salt, and pepper.
2. In a large bowl, combine the chopped cabbage, bell pepper, onion, carrots, celery, and cucumber.
3. Pour the dressing over the vegetables and gently mix until all ingredients are well coated.
4. Cover the bowl and refrigerate overnight to allow flavors to meld.
5. The salad will keep in the refrigerator for up to one week.
